input_messages.content: {"suggestions": ["Configure UFW firewall on the UbuntuComputer to restrict outbound traffic and block unauthorized scanning attempts from the compromised host", "Harden Cisco switch configurations by enabling port security features and disabling unused ports to reduce attack surface and limit scanning capability", "Implement network segmentation by applying VLANs and access control lists on switches and routers to isolate critical assets from the compromised host"], "chosen_mitigation": "Configure UFW firewall on the UbuntuComputer to restrict outbound traffic and block unauthorized scanning attempts from the compromised host", "no_mitigation_left": false, "current_mitigations_counter": 8, "reached_mitigation_limit": false}

additional_info.chosen_mitigation: Configure UFW firewall on the UbuntuComputer to restrict outbound traffic and block unauthorized scanning attempts from the compromised host
